text: Daniel Radcliffe just revealed some of the bizarre props he secretly kept after filming the Harry Potter movies.
Let's get into it!
We all got to know and love Daniel Radcliffe as THE Harry Potter.
He grew up before our eyes, and the movies were clearly special to him as well.
Over the years since the last movie came out, Daniel has revealed what items, props, and mementos he kept from his time as Harry Potter.
He said he has some of Harry's wands and glasses, but he just revealed that he has another prop that might surprise or even shock you!
Diehard Harry Potter fans probably remember this scene in Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets when Harry's arm bones are removed due to a failed spell by Gilderoy Lockhart.
Lockhart was trying to mend his broken bones but instead, this happened.
To get his bones back, Harry needed to drink from dreadful tasting Skele-Gro, but in real life, Daniel just had to wear a prosthetic arm in the scene.
Thankfully, no real bones were removed or regrown during the making of this scene in Harry Potter.
And funnily enough, Daniel actually kept that limp prosthetic arm from the second movie.
It's been almost 20 years since the Chamber of Secrets was released, and Daniel still has Harry's prosthetic arm in his parent's attic.
During a new interview with BBC Radio 1, Daniel revealed what props he has, including the arm.
He said quote, "I've got a bunch of stuff from Harry Potter. I've got a couple of sets of the glasses.”
Daniel went on and discussed the arm.
“It's at my parent's house I guess, maybe in the attic."
"What a weird thing for someone to find in the attic one day!"
"I've got a prosthetic arm that was, um,  that was molded for me in the scene where Harry, like, lost all the bones in his arm."
And the prosthetic arm isn't the bizarre prop Daniel revealed he has.
"And also, a, like a mold of my face that was taken when I was, like, 10 or 11, which it looks like a death mask."
"Yeah, so they're around somewhere."
Completely understandable why only Daniel would have these props because they were made specially for him.
Out of all the Harry Potter props, it might be a little strange if Emma Watson or Rupert Grint had decided to keep a mold of Daniel's face, ya know what I mean?
And, hey, seems like Daniel could use these props someday as a funny prank or Halloween decorations.
I guess you never know when random fake body parts could be used!
As for what else Daniel has been up to besides talking about the old Harry Potter props he has stashed in his parent's attic?
Well, he said he's been bingeing Schitt's Creek and The Bachelor and he revealed he's secretly a real Bachelor Nation's fan.
He particularly enjoyed Clare Crawley and Tayshia Adams' season that wrapped at the end of last year.

"Earlier in the year, there was like a season of the Bachelor where they had all like just slightly older people just like people in their late 20s and early 30s - The difference it made to the show was crazy and lovely.”
Well, there you have it, Daniel Radcliffe is a fan of The Bachelor and has a prosthetic Harry Potter arm in his attic… how random yet so satisfying!

Then be sure to let me know your thoughts on these bizarre props Daniel has kept and what you would have wanted to keep in the comments below.

I'll catch you later.  Bye guys!
